name: 无理数
subject: math
domain_name: 数系 / Number System / Number System
curriculum_points: Define irrational numbers and distinguish them from rational numbers by their non-terminating, non-repeating decimal expansions.
Approximate the value of irrational numbers (e.g., π, √2) on a number line and use them to solve problems involving the Pythagorean Theorem.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像
